headline: Iran re-escalation creates crowded energy longs (overbought) and a chip/REIT flush (oversold) — July 14 CPI is the landmine for every rate-sensitive setup.

status_label: 10 SETUPS · DUAL EXTREME · HORMUZ OIL SPIKE + SEMI SELLOFF
headline: Overbought energy ETFs (oil/LNG spike on Hormuz attack) vs. oversold semis (INTC, MU, MRVL selloff) — two opposing extremes with a hawkish FOMC-minutes landmine at 2 PM ET today.

Chip selloff creates multi-measure oversold in SOXX/MU/MRVL; oil/gold war-premium unwind nearing completion; defense (ITA/LMT) stretched overbought on NATO/Iran premium; VXX at 52-wk low — no vol fade today.
Iran de-escalation drains war premium — energy & AI sell-off create oversold setups; defense & gold overbought fade in progress; VIX calm at ~16.
Energy, silver, bonds & bitcoin are deeply oversold post-Iran ceasefire & Warsh shock — but today's NFP can flip every thesis; semis & PANW overbought after historic H1 run.
